prompt: Write the opening paragraph of a children's book about a shy octopus who wants to make friends.
response: In a quiet corner of the coral reef, tucked beneath a rainbow-colored ledge of coral, lived a little octopus named Ollie. Ollie had eight wiggly arms, big curious eyes, and a heart full of wishes—especially the wish to have a friend. But every time a fish swam by or a crab scuttled close, Ollie would blush a soft purple and shrink behind his rock, whispering to himself, “What if they don’t like me?” Though the reef buzzed with laughter and games, Ollie stayed quiet, dreaming of a day when he’d finally say hello.
